systems.name: SaaS tier system (Free / Pro / Elite)
systems.offer: Tiered intelligence SaaS access with gated controls and upgrade flow.
systems.audience: Operators needing intelligence dashboard access from trial to premium execution.
systems.deliveryPath: Landing -> Pricing -> Checkout intent -> Tier-gated dashboard
systems.nextLocalAction: Finalize entitlement matrix in client gating logic and map plan labels to UI states.

systems.name: Apple Books funnels
systems.offer: Book-specific funnel messaging and CTA routing into Apple Books listings.
systems.audience: Spiritual research readers, doctrine-focused readers, and narrative mystery audience segments.
systems.deliveryPath: Content snippets -> themed funnel blocks -> Apple Books links
systems.nextLocalAction: Publish 3 funnel variants with source tags and conversion placeholders.

systems.name: Intelligence report products
systems.offer: Recurring report SKUs with free teaser and paid depth access.
systems.audience: Users who need condensed strategic signals and action-oriented report formats.
systems.deliveryPath: Dashboard teaser -> product panel -> tier-gated report views
systems.nextLocalAction: Draft product packaging and map each report class to Free/Pro/Elite visibility.

systems.name: Digital bundle products
systems.offer: Bundled assets combining reports, guides, and templates into higher-value packages.
systems.audience: Buyers seeking complete implementation kits instead of standalone resources.
systems.deliveryPath: Pricing upsell -> bundle detail panel -> checkout-ready placeholders
systems.nextLocalAction: Define initial 3 bundles and attach upsell messaging by user tier.

systems.name: Saint Black music funnels
systems.offer: Narrative-led music promotion flows driving listeners to streaming/store destinations.
systems.audience: Brand-following listeners and discovery audiences from story-based promotion.
systems.deliveryPath: Story hooks -> artist funnel panel -> streaming/store CTA
systems.nextLocalAction: Create 14-day campaign sequence with CTA path variants and tracking tags.
